summary: Iteration 7 re-test after iter6 fixes. BOTH flagged issues are now fixed. Backend: full iter6 pytest suite (15/15) now passes — /api/page-templates correctly rejects invalid blocks (type='banana', section without section_type, richtext with section_type) with 422 via shared BlockIn validator imported from routers.pages. TemplateIn.blocks is now List[BlockIn]; _strip_block_ids handles BlockIn via model_dump(). Frontend: PageRail loading-state race fixed — cold visit to /edit/page/{id} renders all 4 pages in ~1.5s, no stuck 'Loading…'. SectionRail equivalent fix verified (8 sections render on cold visit). PageTemplatePicker equivalent fix verified (customLoading flips false within 500ms of 200 OK; 'Loading…' text disappears, built-in templates + custom grid render). retest_needed is now FALSE.

minor.issue: Still publicly accessible (pre-existing, not in scope of iter6/7).

issues: PageRail collapsed width is 64px (w-16). Iter6 review brief said 60px — cosmetic 4px diff, non-blocking; flagged previously, still open.

critical_code_review_comments: page_templates.py now imports BlockIn from routers.pages — clean reuse. For a future refactor, extracting BlockIn to /app/backend/models/blocks.py would avoid the cross-router import smell, but not required for functionality.

_strip_block_ids handles both BlockIn instances and raw dicts via duck-typing on .model_dump(). Works but consider always relying on model_dump() now that TemplateIn typing guarantees BlockIn instances — dict branch is dead code post-fix.

Loading-state fix (`.finally(() => setLoading(false))` without `!cancelled` guard) is applied identically in PageRail.jsx, SectionRail.jsx, and PageTemplatePicker.jsx — consistent across all three. The `cancelled` flag is retained on the setItems/setCustomTemplates calls (correct) to avoid state updates on unmounted components, but loading is always finalized — exactly the right split.
Pre-existing: /api/scrape-product has no auth gate — future ticket.
seed_data_creation: Pytest fixtures auto-clean TEST_-prefixed pages/templates created during the run. Verified no leftover test data after pytest completion.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter6 review points are all green. The two stray pages from iter6 (TEST_iter6_pageA, TEST_iter6_pageB) may still be in pazmaskell's account — harmless but cleanable via DELETE /api/pages/{page_id}. Backend pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_iter6_block_validator.py is the go-to regression for block validation; add to any future iter7+ CI runs. Frontend rail/picker loading race fix pattern (drop `!cancelled &&` around finally setLoading) should be applied consistently to any new rail-style sidebars going forward.
rca of the issue: N/A — both previously-flagged issues are resolved. Verification: (1) backend test TestPageTemplatesValidator::test_template_invalid_block_type_rejected flipped from FAIL→PASS (422 as expected); (2) frontend cold-visit to /edit/page/{id} renders page-rail-item-* rows within ~1.5s with 'Loading…' text absent, same for SectionRail and PageTemplatePicker.
